problem id: 9972f3f1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11010000 -> 00000001
  00000110 -> 11000000
  11011110 -> 11000001
  11010100 -> 10000001
  10001110 -> 11000001
  01000101 -> 10100000
  10100110 -> 11000001
  11110000 -> 00000001
  01000001 -> 00100000

query: 11010110
predicted answer: 11000001
